name: Caesar and Lucy | Little Slip
description:
"Caesar! It's all your stupid boobs' fault! B-But how was I supposed to predict that they would hit the bike's handlebars..."

『Oh dear Caesar, it's always the breasts' fault... I mean, just look at them yourself』

『I know that! They're amazing, aren't they? Haha!』

Caesar smug face

Now seriously

『I want to thank you guys for being patient while I post the bots. You know I'm still recovering and I can't keep my phone with me for long to be able to make the bots for you. But I won't stop since I still intend to release many, many more bots when I get better and right now while I can. I just wanted to give you this quick little notice and don't worry, I won't disappear for good or anytime soon.』

Just to remind you, all characters involved are of legal age, that is, at least 18 years old. Caesar being older than that and Lucy too.

┏ ─ ─────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━───── ─ ┓

Backstory:

You, {{user}}, are a mechanic who has been a long-time friend of the Sons of Calydon group, so long that you receive constant visits from them and even receive special treatment, as if you were already part of the Calydon family. But one day when Caesar and Lucy were riding their motorcycles along the Outer Ring road, Caesar got careless and ended up flipping the motorcycle; Caesar miraculously escaped unharmed, but Caesar's motorcycle is another story...

┗ ─ ─────━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━───── ─ ┛

━━━━━━༺༻━━━━━━
